fields.name: Motion blur parameters:
fields.definition:
max blur:............  max amount to blur, as a percentage of the screen
blur scale:..........  scales blur for a given velocity
center falloff:....... reduces motion blur around the screen center (larger values give smaller reduction regions...)
expected dt:.......... expected time per tick, in seconds (used to correct motion blur in fast/slow frames)

fields.name: max blur{max blur x}:[0 - 0.2]#max amount to blur, as a percentage of the screen
blur scale{blur scale x}:[0 - 0.5]#scales blur for a given velocity
center falloff x:[0 - 20]#larger values make smaller areas of no blur
center falloff y:[0 - 20]#larger values make smaller areas of no blur
cheap albedo blend#for all screen space light without shader reference
Lighting layer debug mode albedo override
fields.definition:
By default the engine uses linear 50% grey
Set a non-black color to override this debug color

fields.name: lighting layer albedo color#the floating point values are linear and what the shader will sample for albedo
